title: New Evangelion Characters Eva Store Wall
display_title: New Evangelion Characters Eva Store Wall
wikitext:
[]: New Evangelion Characters? [Eva Store Wall]             Quote Post by Evangelion » Wed Nov 23, 2011 2:57 am Hey guys! I don't know if this has been posted, but I found this image today. Is it possible that more new characters might be introduced in Rebuild? I can identify most of the people in the picture, but there's a couple that seem new, unless they're characters from another anime or something. What do you guys think? Here's the link were the I found the image: http://otanews.livedoor.biz/archives/51840436.html

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 23, 2011 3:06 am Google renders the image caption as Character silhouette silhouette mural behind the mysterious Eva store! What new characters?

[]:             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Wed Nov 23, 2011 3:58 am That's really interesting, and really mysterious! So the seven at the right are clear. The group in the middle left seems to be the three bridge crew members. But who are the other people? Maybe some of the shadows could be younger versions of the older Eva characters? The shadow second from the far left looks like a young Ritsuko. Maybe Keel on the far left?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 23, 2011 4:01 am I also feel that I ought to recognise the trio in the middle -- the figures with hat, cape and great-coat (reading r-to-l), and not as Eva characters.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion » Wed Nov 23, 2011 4:02 am Mr. Tines wrote: I also feel that I ought to recognise the trio in the middle -- the figures with hat, cape and great-coat (reading r-to-l), and not as Eva characters.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Nov 23, 2011 4:48 am More speculation: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-1401.html

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Nov 23, 2011 5:17 am ^ Main points of the speculation: - In the pic second from last - the pink silhouettes are those could not be identified with the current cast. - The blogger kind of "forcibly match" Misato and Ritsuko in the middle, next to the bridge crew. - One character seems to be a new pilot? - Shinji is wearing short pants? Any significance? Hint of hospital stay? - One mysterious figure wears the same armband was Maya. Same operator team?

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Wed Nov 23, 2011 6:26 am More new characters? *sigh* Asuka did not get enough screentime in the last one now they may be introuducing more new characters, now I really hope Q and final are seperate (but not a two or three year gap seperate but 6 or 7 months)

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Nov 23, 2011 8:48 am I see this from the left as: Possibly keele new pilot? (certainly the same size as the other 'children' Misato with a haircut? dont know. Kensuke maybe? hyuga maya aoba dont know (ritsu? young gendo a la NGE ep 21?) no idea Another new pilot? the rest are obvious So Misato, ritsuko, toji, kensuke, hikari and Kaji are either not there or not immediately apparent. The -namis are all in their plugsuits, shinjis in something unusual for him and kaworu's in his smart casual NGE-garb not a plugsuit. It would be unusual if this were rebuild characters sharing limelight with characters from other series - it would be usual to spread the principals of the show around the group rather than all being bunched to the right. And then it would be add to have the bridge bunnies and not at least Misato if not Ritsuko. It would also be rather unprecedented to have more than one version of the same character in official stuff if that is young-gendo, young-ritsuko et al in there. Maybe 3.0 will be two stories, one in the 'present' of the series and one in the ep21-a-like past of the rebuild continuity, running concurrently.

[]:             Quote Post by Nivek » Wed Nov 23, 2011 9:05 am Final Messenger wrote: More new characters? *sigh* Asuka did not get enough screentime in the last one now they may be introuducing more new characters, now I really hope Q and final are seperate (but not a two or three year gap seperate but 6 or 7 months)

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Wed Nov 23, 2011 10:23 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Nov 23, 2011 10:41 am in b4 the new characters-pilots (?) get killed like half the KOR in Code Geass, near the last episodes, who appeared for 4 brief seconds.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Nov 23, 2011 10:43 am Aaaand the ANN article. http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2011-11-23/tokyo-evangelion-store-displays-unidentified-characters I´m kind of hyped although some of those silhouettes just look like child or young adult versions of the older cast.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Wed Nov 23, 2011 10:45 am My prediction for the new pilots (?) is that they will be like the drugies from Gundam seed and just show up to fight the main cast and have their back story very poorly explained and get killed towards the end (I'll lol if the M.P. evas wind up getting pilots)

[]:             Quote Post by Brainman » Wed Nov 23, 2011 11:18 am The guy on the far left looks like one of the guys from the antarctica base in the beginning of 2.0. Which plays into my theory of Nerv Japan being taken over by leaders of foreign divisions if the silhouettes around him are his cohorts.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Nov 23, 2011 11:18 am If any of those are Ritsuko, they ruined her hair.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Nov 23, 2011 11:21 am I sincerely hope that this is just our regular cast in some alternative versions, meaning new outfits or versions of different ages. Maybe the girl with the hat left of Kaworu is a young Misato? Maybe there are a few Rei clones amongst the silouettes (tres, quatro and cinquecento)? Perhaps a few parents (Dr K; Asuka's mom, etc.)? BTW, anyone see Yui? If Khara decides to really throw in some relevant new characters into the mix, thereby either creating a cast of barely developed stubs, or padding out the movies in ways that would put Twilight to shame (but hey, it's more merchandise!), allow me to preemptively [URL=http://imageshack.us/photo/my-images/191/doublefacepalmf.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Nov 23, 2011 11:35 am BTW, anyone see Yui?

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Wed Nov 23, 2011 11:39 am Considering that 3.0 includes a backstory for the older characters, your theory makes sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Nov 23, 2011 11:48 am I'm pretty damn positive 3.0 is going to open with a flashback of Yui being absorbed into Evangelion Unit 01 back in the day. If that does happen it could explain some of the silhouettes as younger versions of the characters. Of course there is no baby Shinji so that could poke holes in my theory. Anywho, it's nice SOMETHING is finally going on with 3.0
